payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Narrow, tall dark-brown stained wooden cabinet door with a single recessed central panel and visible wood grain; matte finish with light scuffs and no visible handle; right edge of the door is slightly cropped by the image and lighting is dim — object appears roughly 1.0 m from the camera.
